query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A nighttime image of flowing hair in motion, with strands streaking diagonally across the frame in saturated reds, oranges, blues, and purples. Bright out-of-focus light bokeh appears in the dark background along with scattered airborne particles or moisture. The hair dominates the lower right and central portions of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred nighttime image of flowing hair streaking diagonally across the frame in saturated reds, oranges, blues, and purples, with color fringing along the edges creating rainbow chromatic aberration. Bright blown-out light bokeh and scattered particles appear in the dark background. The hair enters from an off-frame source, with the subject's face and body entirely cropped out and withheld, leaving only abstract streaks of color and movement that deny clear representation.
